dashboard.tagline: Fresh produce, direct from local farmers.
dashboard.buyDesc: Find fresh produce near you — pick it yourself, grab it from a stand, or get it delivered.
dashboard.sellDesc: List your produce — open your fields for picking, set up a stand, or announce a delivery run.

register.title: Join Ubrano
register.pinHint: 📍 Click the map to set your OPG location (private):
register.errPhone: As a farmer you must enter a phone number so buyers can contact you.
register.errOpg: As a farmer you must enter OPG name, MIBPG, and drop your OPG pin on the map.

buy.gpsNotAvailable: GPS not available, tap the map instead.
buy.gpsError: Could not get GPS, tap the map instead.
buy.setLocationFirst: Set a location first — use GPS or tap the map.

buyStands.hint: 👆 Use GPS, or tap the map to search a different spot (e.g. where you're heading).
buyStands.noResults: No stands found in this area.

buyFields.noResults: No fields found in this area.

buyDelivery.hint: 👆 Set where you want delivery — use GPS or tap the map. Shows deliveries whose range covers that spot.

myFields.mapHint: 👆 Click anywhere on the map to drop a pin for your field entrance
myFields.heading: My Fields ({{count}})
myFields.empty: No fields yet. Click the map to add one!
myFields.validationError: Please click on the map to drop a pin and enter a name!
myFields.deleteConfirm: Delete field "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

myStands.mapHint: 👆 Click the map to set your stand location
myStands.heading: My Stands ({{count}})
myStands.empty: No stands yet. Click the map to add one!
myStands.validationError: Please name the stand and drop a pin!
myStands.deleteConfirm: Delete stand "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

myDelivery.title: Create a Delivery Event 🚚
myDelivery.mapHint: 👆 Click the map to set your delivery destination (e.g. Split center)
myDelivery.heading: My Delivery Events ({{count}})
myDelivery.validationError: Name, date, and a destination pin are required!
myDelivery.deleteConfirm: Delete delivery "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

opg.title: My OPG
opg.ibanHelp: Used to generate your payment barcode. Never shown to buyers directly.

productManager.title: Products here
productManager.validationError: Pick a product and set a price!

getPaid.title: Get Paid 💳
getPaid.scanHint: Buyer scans this with their own m-banking app — they can adjust the amount there before confirming.
